title: Savory Crunchy Brazilian Tofu Crumble
description: This savory crunchy dish features a blend of tofu crumbles with rice vermicelli and other flavorful ingredients to create a brunch-friendly, chewy and sour-tasting meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped onions
ingredients.notes: ensure they are safe to consume if you have any onion allergy

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional for heat)
1/2 cup finely chopped bell peppers, any color
ingredients.notes: ensure they are safe to consume if you have any pepper allergy

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fresh parsley or cilantro leaves, chopped

instructions: Drain and rinse the rice vermicelli well under cold water.
In a large bowl, blend the drained tofu with soy sauce, minced garlic, ground cumin, red pepper flakes (if using), salt and pepper to taste. Mix until smooth.
Add the soaked and drained rice vermicelli into the tofu mixture and stir in finely chopped onions and bell peppers.
Fold in chopped parsley or cilantro leaves for a fresh touch and enhance the dish's vibrant color and aroma.
Divide the mixture evenly among 4-6 small ramekins or individual serving dishes. Cover with plastic wrap to prevent sogginess, refrigerate overnight if desired for better texture.
When ready to serve, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake the crumbles until golden brown and crispy on top, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve warm as a side dish or main course. Enjoy with your favorite Brazilian accompaniments like avocado salsa or citrus-topped guacamole.
